Configure which paths to scan for unused: Configure which paths to scan for unused datapoints. Each path will get its own result state with a JSON table.
Datapoints not updated for this many day: Datapoints not updated for this many days are marked as 'dead'
Datapoints not updated for this many days are marked as 'stale'
Each scan result contains a JSON array w: Each scan result contains a JSON array with the following 10 fields per datapoint:
For German tables: Use status_de and iss:
For German tables: Use status_de and issue_de columns
For English tables: Use status and issue columns

Filter by 'issue != null' to show only problematic datapoints.

How often the automatic scan should run: How often the automatic scan should run (minimum 1 hour)
When enabled, all configured paths will: When enabled, all configured paths will be scanned automatically at the specified interval
